body:
Supersedes #77.

## Summary
- add issue-backed child orchestration via internal `delegate_issue` planner decisions while keeping `/orchestrate` as the public route
- fold in follow-up fixes from PR #77 for capability gating, child issue validation/reuse, terminal reporting, and visible failure comments
- trust GitHub-visible sub-orchestration control markers only when they are authored by the authenticated agent/app actor
- update stale action docs and narrow terminal child-result classification away from broad free-form reason matching

## Validation
- `npm --prefix .agent test` (439 tests passed)
- `npm --prefix .agent run build`
- `node --test .agent/dist/__tests__/orchestrate-handoff-cli.test.js .agent/dist/__tests__/sub-orchestration.test.js .agent/dist/__tests__/orchestrator-preflight-cli.test.js` (30 tests passed)
title: Add delegate_issue child orchestration with trusted marker state
